product_code: Unique code assigned to each credit card product
product_name: Name of the credit card product
card_type: Type of credit card based on network or category
credit_limit_type: Whether the card is secured or unsecured
card_category: Segmentation category based on customer group
issue_channel: Channel through which the card is issued
valid_to: Card product end or expiry date (if any)
reward_program: Reward program or loyalty scheme applicable to the card
default_credit_limit: Default credit limit provided for this card type
annual_fee: Annual fee charged for the card
interest_rate: Standard interest rate for revolving credit balance
billing_cycle_days: Number of days in the billing cycle
created_dt: Date on which the product record was created
last_updated_dt: Last updated timestamp for the card product information
active_flag: Flag to indicate if the card product is currently active
